name: Plain Fried Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
2. Add the onion and stir-fry for 3 minutes.
3. Add the garlic and stir-fry until both are golden.
4. Add the rice and tofu, then stir-fry for an additional 3 minutes.
5. Sprinkle with soy sauce and white pepper.
6. Remove from heat and place in a serving dish surrounded by garnishes.
